COLLECT TFA
============
/oracle/product/grid_home1/tfa/bin/./tfactl diagcollect -all -from "Dec/01/2022 05:30:00" -to "Dec/01/2022 06:30:00"

$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl diagcollect -all -from "Feb/11/2022 05:00:00" -to "Feb/24/2022 08:00:00"



./tfactl diagcollect -all
./tfactl diagcollect -all -since 6h
 /opt/oracle.ahf/ahf/bin/tfactl diagcollect -all -since 3h

$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc dbrac -nososreport 

$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc dbrac -nososreport -from "Nov/17/2024 22:26:00" -to "Nov/18/2024 00:26:00" 

/opt/oracle.ahf/ahf/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc dbrac -nososreport -from "Nov/17/2024 22:26:00" -to "Nov/18/2024 00:26:00" 

/opt/oracle.ahf/ahf/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc dbrac -nososreport

$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc dbrac ora600

$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl diagcollect -all -nososreport -from "Jan/15/2026 06:00:00" -to "Jan/15/2026 08:00:00"

run this one
=============
/opt/oracle.ahf/ahf/bin/tfactl diagcollect -nososreport -noclassify -from "Nov/17/2024 22:26:00" -to "Nov/18/2024 00:26:00" 


$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc dbracperf -nososreport

tfactl diagcollect -srdc dbrac -nososreport -noclassify

$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl stop
$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl start
$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc ora600

$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl print status

$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc ora600
$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl diagcollect -noclassify -srdc ora600
$TFA_HOME/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc ora7445

/opt/oracle.ahf/ahf/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc dbrac ora600

/opt/oracle.ahf/ahf/bin/tfactl diagcollect -srdc ora7445


 tar -cvf tfa_all_nodes_1.tar.gz /oracle/export/CHG1789783/tfa1


COLLECT AND UPLOAD
==================
tfactl diagcollect -upload mos -srdc ora00600 -id 3-32036791821
tfactl diagcollect -upload mos -srdc ORA-07445 -id 3-32036791821
tfactl diagcollect -upload mos -all -since 2h -id 3-32036791821


TFACTL STATUS CHECK
===================
sudo /auto/hosting/bin/Oracle/database/tfa_ahf/TFA_REPORT_V1.py status
 
TFACTL STOP
============ 
sudo /auto/hosting/bin/Oracle/database/tfa_ahf/TFA_REPORT_V1.py stop

TFACTL START
============  
sudo /auto/hosting/bin/Oracle/database/tfa_ahf/TFA_REPORT_V1.py start

Oracle SR for critical ORA- error
==================================

$ORACLE_HOME/OPatch/opatch lsinventory -invPtrLoc $ORACLE_HOME/oraInst.loc -detail > /tmp/<DB NAME>_OPatch.log


Uploading files to the oracle SR
================================
curl -# -o output --location-trusted --location --request  PUT "https://support.oracle.com/cloud-transport/cfm/fileManagement/serviceRequests/%SRnum%/attachment/upload/%filename%?visibility=MISC&restricted=EPHI" --header "Content-Type: application/octet-stream" --header "Authorization: Bearer %token%" -T "%filename%" -w "%{http_code}"  

* Replace %filename% in 2 places with the actual filename with extension, you are uploading.
* Please ensure the filename doesn't have any spaces.
* Replace %SRnum% with the actual SR number you are uploading the file to.
* Replace %token% with the file upload token copied from the customer portal preferences page (60 minutes validity).
* To obtain your token, click on Account in top right corner of the portal, and select "Preferences". In the Personal Information section, click on "Generate File Upload Token" and copy the token.

For more information visit
https://support.oracle.com/support/?anchorId=%23UFSR2GB&kmContentId=10024001&page=sptemplate&sptemplate=km-article#UFSR2GB



curl -# -o output \
--location-trusted \
--location \
--request  PUT "https://support.oracle.com/cloud-transport/cfm/fileManagement/serviceRequests/%SRnum%/attachment/upload/%filename%?visibility=MISC&restricted=EPHI" \
--header "Content-Type: application/octet-stream" --header "Authorization: Bearer %token%" \n 
-T "%filename%" -w "%{http_code}"
